subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy call hath reached the precincts of the Most Great Throne, and the Ancient King hath hearkened unto it and commandeth from the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ندایت بساحت عرش اعظم رسید و مالک قدم آنرا شنید و میفرماید از حق
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
